targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') / 10 AS "Temperatura",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') /1 AS "Humedad"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_oficina'
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') / 10 AS "Temperatura",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') /1 AS "Humedad"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_dormitorio'
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."27"') / 10 AS "Temperatura",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."46"') / 1 AS "Humedad"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_display_salon'
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') / 10 AS "Temperatura",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') /1 AS "Humedad"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_salon'
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  (
    (SELECT CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
     FROM device_status 
     WHERE device_name = 'termometro_salon' 
     ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) 
    - 
    (SELECT CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
     FROM device_status 
     WHERE device_name = 'termometro_dormitorio' 
     ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
  ) / 10 AS "Diferencia Actual"

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  -- Bytes 6-8: Potencia (Dividido por 1000)
  -- CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 6, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS "Potencia (KW)",
  -- Bytes 3-5: Potencia (Dividido por 1000)
  CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 3, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS "Intensidad (A)"
FROM (
  SELECT 
    ts,
    -- Decodificamos el Base64 que está dentro del JSON en la clave "6" (o el número que corresponda en tu dps)
    FROM_BASE64(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."6"')) AS decoded_blob
  FROM device_status 
  WHERE 
    device_name = 'Automatico' 
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
) AS raw_data
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  -- Bytes 6-8: Potencia (Dividido por 1000)
  CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 6, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS "Potencia (KW)"

FROM (
  SELECT 
    ts,
    -- Decodificamos el Base64 que está dentro del JSON en la clave "6" (o el número que corresponda en tu dps)
    FROM_BASE64(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."6"')) AS decoded_blob
  FROM device_status 
  WHERE 
    device_name = 'Automatico' 
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
) AS raw_data
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  -- Bytes 6-8: Potencia (Dividido por 1000)
  -- CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 6, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS "Potencia (KW)",
  -- Bytes 3-5: Potencia (Dividido por 1000)
  -- CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 3, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS "Intensidad (A)"
  -- Bytes 1-2: Tensión (Dividido por 10)
  CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 1, 2)), 16, 10) / 10 AS "Tensión (V)"

FROM (
  SELECT 
    ts,
    -- Decodificamos el Base64 que está dentro del JSON en la clave "6" (o el número que corresponda en tu dps)
    FROM_BASE64(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."6"')) AS decoded_blob
  FROM device_status 
  WHERE 
    device_name = 'Automatico' 
    AND JSON_EXISTS(status_json, '$.dps."6"') -- ESTO FILTRA SOLO LAS FILAS QUE TIENEN EL DPS 6
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
) AS raw_data
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.heating.value') AS INT ) AS heating
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termo' 
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.current_temperature.value') AS DOUBLE) AS "Temperatura Termo"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termo' 
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.eco.value') AS INT ) AS "Modo Eco",
  CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.required_temperature.value') AS DOUBLE) AS "Temperatura requerida"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termo' 
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  MAX(CASE WHEN device_name = 'termometro_salon' THEN CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 10 END) AS "Exterior",
  MAX(CASE WHEN device_name = 'termometro_oficina' THEN CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 10 END) AS "oficina",
  MAX(CASE WHEN device_name = 'termometro_dormitorio' THEN CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 10 END) AS "Dormitorio",
  MAX(CASE WHEN device_name = 'termometro_display_salon' THEN CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."27"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 10 END) AS "Salon"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name IN ('termometro_salon', 'termometro_dormitorio','termometro_display_salon','termometro_oficina')
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') AS "Estado"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'Puerta_entrada'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  -- Bytes 6-8: Potencia (Dividido por 1000)
  CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 6, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS "Potencia (KW)"
FROM (
  SELECT 
    ts,
    -- Decodificamos el Base64 que está dentro del JSON en la clave "6" (o el número que corresponda en tu dps)
    FROM_BASE64(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."6"')) AS decoded_blob
  FROM device_status 
  WHERE 
    device_name = 'Automatico' 
    AND JSON_EXISTS(status_json, '$.dps."6"') -- ESTO FILTRA SOLO LAS FILAS QUE TIENEN EL DPS 6
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
) AS raw_data
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."9"') AS "fault"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'Automatico'
  AND JSON_EXISTS(status_json, '$.dps."9"') -- ESTO FILTRA SOLO LAS FILAS QUE TIENEN EL DPS 1
  AND JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."9"')
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.current_temperature.value') AS DOUBLE) AS "Temperatura Termo"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termo' 
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  MAX(CASE WHEN device_name = 'termometro_salon' THEN CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 1 END) AS "Exterior",
  MAX(CASE WHEN device_name = 'termometro_oficina' THEN CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 1 END) AS "oficina",
  MAX(CASE WHEN device_name = 'termometro_dormitorio' THEN CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 1 END) AS "Dormitorio",
  MAX(CASE WHEN device_name = 'termometro_display_salon' THEN CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."46"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 1 END) AS "Salon"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name IN ('termometro_salon', 'termometro_dormitorio','termometro_display_salon','termometro_oficina')
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."4"') /1 AS "Batt"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_oficina'
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."4"') /1 AS "Batt"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_salon'
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."4"') /1 AS "Batt"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_dormitorio'
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."101"') AS "Batt"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_display_salon'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.heating.value') AS INT ) AS heating
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termo' 
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.eco.value') AS INT ) AS eco
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termo' 
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') / 10 AS "Temperatura"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_salon'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') / 10 AS "Temperatura"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_oficina'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  -- Bytes 6-8: Potencia (Dividido por 1000)
  -- CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 6, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS "Potencia (KW)",
  -- Bytes 3-5: Potencia (Dividido por 1000)
  -- CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 3, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS "Intensidad (A)"
  -- Bytes 1-2: Tensión (Dividido por 10)
  CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 1, 2)), 16, 10) / 10 AS "Tensión (V)"

FROM (
  SELECT 
    ts,
    -- Decodificamos el Base64 que está dentro del JSON en la clave "6" (o el número que corresponda en tu dps)
    FROM_BASE64(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."6"')) AS decoded_blob
  FROM device_status 
  WHERE 
    device_name = 'Automatico' 
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
) AS raw_data
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."27"') / 10 AS "Temperatura"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_display_salon'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') / 10 AS "Temperatura"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_dormitorio'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') * 1600 AS "state",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."22"') / 10 AS "Potencia"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'radiador_salon'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') * 1200 AS "state",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."22"') / 10 AS "Potencia"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'radiador_dormitorio'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') * 600 AS "state",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."22"') / 10 AS "Potencia"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'radiador_oficina'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  CAST(CONV(HEX(SUBSTR(decoded_blob, 3, 3)), 16, 10) / 1000 AS DOUBLE) AS "Intensidad (A)"
FROM (
  SELECT 
    ts,
    FROM_BASE64(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."6"')) AS decoded_blob
  FROM device_status 
  WHERE 
    device_name = 'Automatico' 
    AND JSON_EXISTS(status_json, '$.dps."6"') -- ESTO FILTRA SOLO LAS FILAS QUE TIENEN EL DPS 6
    AND $__timeFilter(ts)
) AS raw_data
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') / 1 AS "Humedad"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_dormitorio'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') / 1 AS "Humedad"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_salon'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."2"') / 1 AS "Humedad"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_oficina'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  CONVERT_TZ(ts, 'SYSTEM', '+00:00') AS "time",
  JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."46"') /1 AS "Humedad"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'termometro_display_salon'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(ts, '24h') AS "time",
  (MAX(CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) - MIN(CAST(JSON_VALUE(status_json, '$.dps."1"') AS DECIMAL(10,2)))) / 100 AS "kWh Diario"
FROM device_status
WHERE
  device_name = 'Automatico'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 ASC
